description: You are a Release Manager during a code freeze. Organize your inbox by creating two folders named 'Dev-High-Priority' and 'User-Community'. Sort emails from developer mailing lists (containing '[SAdev]' or 'exmh-workers') into 'Dev-High-Priority' and emails from user/general lists (containing '[SAtalk]', '[ILUG]', or '[zzzzteana]') into 'User-Community'. Within the 'Dev-High-Priority' folder, flag any emails mentioning 'release', 'patch', 'bug', or 'version' in the subject or body. Send an email to 'council@apache.org' with the subject 'Release Triage Status' stating the number of critical emails you flagged.
